tasks.title: GET /v1/invoices/:id functional tests
tasks.description: Functional tests for GET /v1/invoices/:id (UUID lookup). Tests: 200 found with full response shape, 404 not found, response includes all invoice fields (id, status, amount, currency, paymentDetails, settledAt, completedAt, createdAt). File: backend/src/routes/__tests__/invoice-by-id.test.ts

tasks.title: GET /x402/oracle/scores functional tests
tasks.description: Functional tests for bulk agent score lookup. Tests: 200 returns array of scores, agentId filter applied, empty array on no agents, response shape (agentId, score, tier). File: backend/src/routes/__tests__/oracle-scores.test.ts

tasks.title: POST /v1/webhooks/:id/test — webhook test ping
tasks.description: New endpoint: POST /v1/webhooks/:id/test sends a test HTTP POST to the registered webhook URL with a test payload { event: 'test.ping', timestamp }. Returns { success, status: 'delivered'|'failed', responseCode, latencyMs }. If webhook not found: 404. Uses fetch with 5s timeout. File: backend/src/routes/webhooks.ts (add route) + tests. Max 40 new lines.

tasks.title: PATCH /v1/invoices/:id/metadata — update invoice metadata
tasks.description: Add PATCH /v1/invoices/:id/metadata endpoint. Body: { metadata: Record<string, unknown> }. Merges with existing paymentDetails. Returns updated invoice. Validation: metadata must be an object, max 20 keys. Tests: 200 success, 400 invalid metadata, 404 not found. File: backend/src/routes/invoices.ts (add route) + tests.

tasks.title: GET /v1/metrics/agent/:agentId — per-agent metrics
tasks.description: Per-agent metrics endpoint. Returns: { agentId, invoices: { total, byStatus }, totalValueSettled, reputation: { score, tier } | null }. File: backend/src/routes/metrics.ts (add second route) + app.ts registration + 4 tests. Max 50 new lines.
